name: 植物运输
subject: biology
domain_name: 营养与运输 / Nutrition & Transport / Nutrition & Transport
curriculum_points: 2 State that water diffuses through partially permeable membranes by osmosis
3 State that water moves into and out of cells by osmosis through the cell membrane

7 Describe osmosis as the net movement of water molecules from a region of higher water potential (dilute solution) to a region of lower water potential (concentrated solution), through a partially permeable membrane

excerpts.text: 2 State that water diffuses through partially permeable membranes by osmosis
3 State that water moves into and out of cells by osmosis through the cell membrane

7 Describe osmosis as the net movement of water molecules from a region of higher water potential (dilute solution) to a region of lower water potential (concentrated solution), through a partially permeable membrane

interactive_resources.code_hint: Canvas 生物过程动画：细胞/分子/生态系统等可视化模拟
interactive_resources.description: Canvas/JS 生物过程可视化模拟

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「植物运输」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：2 State that water diffuses through partially permeable membranes by osmosis…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：3 State that water moves into and out of cells by osmosis through the cell membr… 对理解「植物运输」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
